title: Self Adhesive Mirror Tiles,4 Pcs 30x30cm (2mm Thick) Stick On Mirrors For Walls,Acrylic Stick On Mirrors For Wardrobe Doors Bathroom Livingroom Bedroom Decor (4)
features: ✨ Stick on mirrors set: Self adhesive mirrors set includes 4 pieces, each 30x30cm and 2mm thick. Perfect for creating stylish displays or adding practical decor.mirror stickers come with powerful double-sided foam tape,just peel, position, and stick for a hassle-free setup. Alternatively, you can use your own strong adhesive.

✨ Mirror tiles material and use effect: Self-adhesive mirror tile stickers made of acrylic material, more lightweight and safer than glass mirrors, flexible, safe and unbreakable; object imaging is clear and not deformed, with good reflective ability, can be a good alternative to glass mirror decorative.

✨ Widely used self adhesive mirror tiles: You can decorate your bedroom, wardrobe, bathroom and any other place you need! Self adhesive mirror tile is both a make-up mirror, dressing mirror and decorative mirror! Simple and easy to install, does not take up space, so you can stay beautiful anywhere.

✨ Stick on mirror with excellent reflective effect: Our acrylic stick on mirrors for walls with reflective effect can be used for aesthetic decoration; the reflective surface can make the space look bigger and brighter. It is like a small stage for you to be the focus and show your unique self.

✨ Tips for use: Our stick on mirrors suitable for smooth surfaces,please clean the wall before use,please do not use on uneven or damaged walls.there is a transparent protective film on the surface of the acrylic mirror, please remove the protective film after installing the mirror, the mirror will show a clear mirror effect.
